name: gbrain
description: Postgres-native personal knowledge brain with hybrid RAG search

scripts.build:all: bun build --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile bin/gbrain-darwin-arm64 src/cli.ts && bun build --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile bin/gbrain-linux-x64 src/cli.ts
scripts.build:edge: bun run build:schema && bun build src/edge-entry.ts --format=esm --outfile=supabase/functions/gbrain-mcp/gbrain-core.js --external=postgres --external=openai --external=fs --external=os --external=path --external=crypto --external=child_process --external=@aws-sdk/client-s3 --external=@anthropic-ai/sdk --external=gray-matter --minify
